title: FBSPORT ping pong set, Table Tennis Sets, 2 Bats, 6 Balls and extendable ping-pong nets, Professional Ping Pong Racket Paddle Set with Carry Bag, for Indoor/Outdoor Games
features: 【Table Tennis Racket Set】 The table tennis table set contains 2 high quality table tennis paddles, 6 table tennis balls (3 yellow + 3 white) and 1 retractable table tennis net. Everyone can enjoy the fun of this set, especially for trainers, amateurs and beginners.

【High Density Net】 These table tennis nets are made of high quality polyester cotton. The frame wave design corresponds to the design of the human hand. It can be stably installed on a table less than 5 cm thick. Freely shrinkable and easy to carry.

【High Performance Rackets】 FBSPORT The table tennis racket set uses high quality materials that improve speed and improve ball control ability, strong stroke, quick return, good directional effect, excellent attack and defense control ability.

【Ergonomic Handle】Tapered flared design for a perfect grip with handle, which not only can make your hand comfortable while holding the bats, but also can increase the friction between the hands and bats to avoid the slipping.

【Best gift】 This table tennis set is perfect for fun play at school, home, sports club or in the office for daily training, fitness or entertainments. The table tennis bat set also makes for a perfect gift, can be used as a Christmas gift and birthday gift.
description: Product Description Professional Table Tennis Set Racket Material:Wood Net Stand Clamp Diameter: 1.97" Grid Height: 7.4" Net Length: 66.9" Ping Pong Paddle Set The retractable ping pong net frame can be freely extended and extended up to 66.9inch, and can clamp the plane within 1.97inch. Suitable for all kinds of tables, can always set up a table tennis table. The table clamp is firm and stable, strong bite force, stable and non-slip. 2 paddles and 6 balls to share with friends or family members 1 retractable net turned any tables into a ping pong table in seconds Retractable Net Portble Table Tennis Set 2 Rackets & 6 Balls Easy to Carry
